title: Adler-32 checksum with explicit length (RFC 1950, zlib adler32_z variant)
signature: pub fn adler32_z(adler: u32, buf: &[u8], len: usize) -> u32
notes: zlib's adler32_z takes an explicit length so callers can checksum a prefix of buf without re-slicing. Honor min(len, buf.len()) to remain sound under the no-unsafe policy. Returns the new (seeded) Adler-32 value packed as (s2 << 16) | s1.
